step_rationale: Vitamin K-dependent anticoagulant; hemostatic balance marker off the acute atherothrombotic cascade.
mechanism: Protein S deficiency or dysfunction impairs anticoagulation, increasing arterial thrombosis risk independent of plaque-specific mechanisms.
